days.summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0 and also previewed Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena, marking the clearest product artifact in the current cluster set. On the research side, new papers highlighted training and systems efficiency themes: "Pretraining large language models with MXFP4" targets FP4 stability for large-scale LLM training, while "PowerStep" proposes adaptive optimization without second-moment state to reduce memory overhead.
